docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LINCOLN PROPERTY COMPANY, N.C., INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DUNDER, MURRAY DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED

DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT DUNDER, MURRAY
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $140.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE FEB-24-1994, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LINCOLN PROPERTY COMPANY, N.C., INC.

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LINCOLN PROPERTY COMPANY, N.C., INC. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-23-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 03 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON FEB-28-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE JAMES MC BRIDE. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. DEFT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS PUT ON THE RECORD BY THE PLTF'S COUNSEL. JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF AGAINST THE DEFT. PLTF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUNDER, MURRAY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: ONE ST. FRANCIS PLACE APT 1504, SF, CA 94107 $1,380.00 RENT, $600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,120.00, STAYED UNTIL MAR-04-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, IF THE DEFT PAYS TO THE PLTF $2948.50 ON OR BEFORE 4PM3/4/94 IN A CASHIER'S CHECK OR MONEY ORDER THE JUDGMENT WILL BE SA- TISFIED AND THE TENANCY WILL BE REINSTATED.($1380 RENTS/DAMA GES, $600 ATTY FEES, $140 COURT COST, $78.50 POST JUDGMENT COURT COST, $60 LATE CHARGE, $690 RENT FOR MARCH)
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE D.R.V. IS $23.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LINCOLN PROPERTY COMPANY, N.C., INC.
